principles: Separate extraction quality from latency and throughput.
Use local deterministic fixtures to reduce external network variance.
Score required content recall and boilerplate/noise leakage.
Use token-level ground-truth F1 to separate clean extraction from noisy full-page text.
Break down capability by page category and required crawler feature.
Keep the default quick preset short; use all/browser presets only for deeper studies.
Exclude standalone stage probes from scenario winners so deployable pipelines are recommended.
Report unavailable tools instead of silently excluding them.

metrics.success_rate: Returned any content for the fixture URL.
metrics.usable_rate: Returned enough content, hit most required snippets, and avoided forbidden snippets.
metrics.mean_required_recall: Average required gold snippet recall across fixtures.
metrics.mean_text_f1: Token-overlap F1 between extracted text and fixture ground truth.
metrics.median_ms: Median end-to-end profile runtime across benchmark rounds.
metrics.jitter_ms: Max minus min runtime; useful for stability comparisons.

cases.expected_text:
Benchmark Article static-0
GOLD-STATIC-PRIMARY_static-0 stable article body for extraction benchmarking.
GOLD-STATIC-SECONDARY_static-0 repeated readable paragraph with enough text to pass minimum content thresholds and measure quality.
GOLD-STATIC-TERTIARY_static-0 final relevant sentence for recall scoring.

Benchmark Article static-1
GOLD-STATIC-PRIMARY_static-1 stable article body for extraction benchmarking.
GOLD-STATIC-SECONDARY_static-1 repeated readable paragraph with enough text to pass minimum content thresholds and measure quality.
GOLD-STATIC-TERTIARY_static-1 final relevant sentence for recall scoring.

Benchmark Boilerplate boilerplate-0
GOLD-BOILERPLATE-PRIMARY_boilerplate-0 dense relevant content surrounded by noisy navigation.
GOLD-BOILERPLATE-SECONDARY_boilerplate-0 another relevant sentence for precision checks.

Benchmark Docs docs-0
GOLD-DOCS-PRIMARY_docs-0 installation guidance for crawler benchmark users.
GOLD-DOCS-CODE_docs-0 searcrawl benchmark --profile quick
GOLD-DOCS-SECONDARY_docs-0 configuration details with stable option descriptions.

Benchmark Product product-0
GOLD-PRODUCT-NAME_product-0 SearCrawl Test Jacket
GOLD-PRODUCT-PRICE_product-0 129.00
GOLD-PRODUCT-DESCRIPTION_product-0 structured product copy with material and availability facts.

GOLD-LISTING-ITEM-A_listing-0 crawler benchmark adapter
GOLD-LISTING-ITEM-B_listing-0 reader fallback adapter
GOLD-LISTING-ITEM-C_listing-0 browser rendering adapter

Benchmark Thread forum-0
GOLD-FORUM-QUESTION_forum-0 how should crawler fallbacks be ordered?
GOLD-FORUM-ANSWER_forum-0 use static extraction first and render only shell pages.
GOLD-FORUM-FOLLOWUP_forum-0 measure fallback hits separately from total success.

Benchmark Data Table table-0
GOLD-TABLE-HEADER_table-0 Profile Usable Median
GOLD-TABLE-ROW-A_table-0 http_extractor fast static baseline
GOLD-TABLE-ROW-B_table-0 local_playwright rendered fallback

GOLD-SLOW-SECONDARY_slow-0 stable delayed article body.

GOLD-STATIC-PRIMARY_redirect-0 stable article body for extraction benchmarking.
GOLD-STATIC-SECONDARY_redirect-0 repeated readable paragraph with enough text to pass minimum content thresholds and measure quality.
GOLD-STATIC-TERTIARY_redirect-0 final relevant sentence for recall scoring.

GOLD-JS-SECONDARY_shell-0 hydrated detail that is absent from the static DOM.

GOLD-JS-SECONDARY_shell-1 hydrated detail that is absent from the static DOM.

profiles.name: local_playwright
profiles.description: Crawl4AI local Playwright browser fallback; benchmark does not install missing browsers unless SEARCRAWL_BENCHMARK_INSTALL_BROWSERS=1.
